args: [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotificationManager, Windows.UI.Notifications, ContentType = WindowsRuntime] > $null; [Windows.Data.Xml.Dom.XmlDocument, Windows.Data.Xml.Dom.XmlDocument, ContentType = WindowsRuntime] > $null; $xml = New-Object Windows.Data.Xml.Dom.XmlDocument; $toastXml = '<toast><visual><binding template="ToastText02"><text id="1">OpenCode - Notification</text><text id="2"></text><text id="3"></text></binding></visual></toast>'; $xml.LoadXml($toastXml); $xml.SelectSingleNode('//text[@id="2"]').InnerText = '{command}'; $xml.SelectSingleNode('//text[@id="3"]').InnerText = 'Duration: {duration} seconds | Exit: {exit_status}'; $toast = New-Object Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotification $xml; $notifier = [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotificationManager]::CreateToastNotifier('OpenCode'); $notifier.Show($toast)
